issue_description: Terminated employee still has an active Active Directory account.
risk_statement: Unauthorized access may occur if terminated accounts remain active.
recommendation: Disable the account immediately and review offboarding procedures.
framework_mappings: ['SOX ITGC - User Termination', 'NIST AC-2', 'SOC2 CC6.2', 'ISO27001 A.5.18']

risk_statement: Unowned or unmanaged accounts may be used for unauthorized access and may bypass standard joiner/mover/leaver controls.
recommendation: Investigate account ownership, disable if not required, and reconcile identity records with HR.

issue_description: User has conflicting roles: AP_CREATOR and AP_APPROVER.
